title: Electrotransformation of Clostridium species
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dg133","text":"A brief protocol for electrotransformation of Clostridium species","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Inoculate 10 µL, BHI-supplemented broth with 100 µL, stock culture overnight.
Use the overnight culture to inoculate 100 mL, BHI-supplemented broth to a starting density of OD 0.02.
Harvest early-exponential phase culture (OD 0.2 to 0.25) by centrifugation by 12,000g x 00:15:00 at 25 °C .
Wash once in 10 mL, SML electroporation buffer .
Resuspend in 10 mL, SMP electroporation buffer .
Take 400 µL of aliquots and and mix with 500 ng of DNA, transfer to prechilled cuvettes with 0.2cm gap.
Electroporate at the following parameters: 25μF, resistance 200Ω, voltage 1.8kV.
Immediately transfer the cells into 10 mL of BHI broth and incubate for 03:00:00 .
Plate cells in dilutions on solid selective and non-selective BHI agar.
creator: Chin Yee Tan
